dog.mp4:
The video features a golden retriever running joyfully across a lush green field. The dog has a fluffy, golden coat with a friendly expression, its mouth open in what appears to be a happy pant, and its tongue slightly visible. Its ears are perked up, and one ear is caught mid-flap, adding dynamism to the scene. The dog's front paws are extended forward, suggesting rapid movement.

The background consists of a vibrant, sunlit grassy field dotted with small white flowers, transitioning into a blurred line of trees and foliage, indicating depth. The lighting is bright and natural, with a warm, golden hue
